data.body: Resolved in PR #93 (commit d755bfe4e). NOT a code defect: review_plan signs only a genuine non-blocking PASS; BLOCK/INDETERMINATE/exempt emit signature={signed:false, reason:<verdict>} and write NO HMAC event, so the claim gate can never be satisfied by a BLOCK (AC#2 structurally met). The footgun was a presence/truthiness check on the always-present signature object instead of reading signature.signed. Fix: documented the exact contract in docs/plan-review-gate.md (when a signature is emitted + what it guarantees, with an explicit 'read .signed, not presence' callout), AC#1/#3. Regression tests added (AC#4): BLOCK->signed:false + no event + claim denied; PASS->signed:true; mutation-checked (signing-on-BLOCK turns them RED).
